name: University of Notre Dame
meets_full_need_notes: Notre Dame meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic undergraduates. Aid packages include Notre Dame scholarships, federal/state grants, work-study, and sometimes loans.
no_loan_notes: Notre Dame does not have a universal no-loan policy. Loans may be included in aid packages, although need-based grants are substantial and many lower-income families receive very low net prices.
ed_aid_implications: Notre Dame offers Restrictive Early Action, which is non-binding. Aid policies are the same for REA and Regular Decision applicants.
appeal_policy: Students may request a financial aid reconsideration from the Office of Financial Aid. Appeals require documentation of changed circumstances, special expenses, or other factors not represented on aid applications.
